title.ko: 교통제어시스템(철도교통의 안내, 철도교통의 안전확보 B61L; 교통제어용 레이더(radar) 및 유사 시스템, 소나시스템 또는 라이더(lidar)시스템 G01S 13/91, G01S 15/88, G01S 17/88; 충돌방지용 레이더 및 유사 시스템, 소나시스템 또는 라이더시스템 G01S 13/93, G01S 15/93, G01S 17/93; 교통 환경에 특정되지 않는 육상, 수상, 항공, 우주 선체의 위치, 경로, 고도 또는 자세의 제어 G05D 1/00)
title.en: TRAFFIC CONTROL SYSTEMS (guiding railway traffic, ensuring the safety of railway traffic B61L;radar or analogous systems, sonar systems or lidar systems specially adapted for traffic control G01S0013910000, G01S0015880000, G01S0017880000;radar or analogous systems, sonar systems or lidar systems specially adapted for anti-collision purposes G01S0013930000, G01S0015930000, G01S0017930000;control of position, course, altitude or attitude of land, water, air or space vehicles, not being specific to a traffic environment G05D0001000000)

definition.ko: 이 서브클래스는 이하의 것을 포함한다. - 교통위반차량의 인식 - 교통제어를 목적으로 하는 차량의 위치표시 - 교통제어를 목적으로 하는 항법시스템, 즉. 항법이 차량내부 또는 차량에 의해서 자동적으로 미리 결정되는 것이 아니라 차량에 전달되는 명령에 의해서 차량이 유도되는 시스템 - 주차장의 빈 자리 표시

title.ko: 도로 차량을 위한 교통 제어 시스템(도로표시 또는 교통신호의 배치 E01F 9/00)
title.en: Traffic control systems for road vehicles (arrangement of road signs or traffic signals E01F0009000000)
including pedestrian guidance indicator

title.ko: 계수 또는 제어되는 교통량의 검출(G08G 1/07-G08G 1/14가 우선; 차량 또는 차량 사용자에 대한 통행료 또는 혼잡통행료 징수 G07B 15/06)
title.en: Detecting movement of traffic to be counted or controlled (G08G0001070000-G08G0001140000 take precedence;road pricing or congestion charging of vehicles or vehicle users G07B0015060000)
with provision for distinguishing between motor cars and cycles
identifying vehicles (G08G0001015000, G08G0001054000 take precedence)
using treadles built into the road
using optical or ultrasonic detectors
using inductive or magnetic detectors
with provision for compensation of environmental or other condition, e.g. snow, vehicle stopped at detector
with provision for determining speed or overspeed
photographing overspeeding vehicles
with provision for distinguishing direction of travel

title.ko: 도로의 일정구간 내의 차량 또는 주차구역에 있는 차량을 계수하는 것에 의한 것, 즉 들어오는 수와 나가는 수의 비교 (차량 또는 차량 사용자에 대한G07B 15/06)
title.en: by counting the vehicles in a section of the road or in a parking area, i.e. comparing incoming count with outgoing count (road pricing or congestion charging of vehicles or vehicle users G07B0015060000)
Controlling traffic signals
according to detected number or speed of vehicles
Plural intersections under common control
Controlling the time between beginning of the same phase of a cycle at adjacent intersections
Controlling the allocation of time between phases of a cycle
using a free-running cyclic timer
Override of traffic control, e.g. by signal transmitted by an emergency vehicle
Arrangements for giving variable traffic instructions
Traffic lights
transportable
provided with indicators in which a mark progresses showing the time elapsed, e.g. of green phase

title.ko: 차량 내에 장치된 지시수단을 가지는 것, 예. 음성안내를 하는 것
title.en: having an indicator mounted inside the vehicle, e.g. giving voice messages
responding to signals from another vehicle, e.g. emergency vehicle

title.ko: 고속도로 정보의 송신을 포함하는 시스템, 예. 날씨, 제한속도 (G08G1/0968이 우선)
title.en: Systems involving transmission of highway information, e.g. weather, speed limits (G08G0001096800 takes precedence)
Systems involving transmission of navigation instructions to the vehicle
having a display in the form of a map
Supervising of traffic control systems, e.g. by giving an alarm if two crossing streets have green light simultaneously
indicating the position of vehicles, e.g. scheduled vehicles
to a central station
the indicator being in the form of a map
within the vehicle
the indicator being in the form of a map
indicating individual free spaces in parking areas
Anti-collision systems

title.ko: 선박에 대한 교통제어시스템 (운항 경로의 표시 B63B22/16, B63B51/00)
title.en: Traffic control systems for marine craft (marking of navigational route B63B0051000000)
Anti-collision systems
Traffic control systems for aircraft

title.ko: 교통 정보를 취득, 생성, 공유 또는 표시하기 위한 장치 (교통을 모니터링하기 위한 장치 G08G5/72)

located onboard the aircraft
located on the ground

Details of user input interfaces, e.g. use of speech recognition or specific text formats

Transmission of traffic-related information between aircraft and ground stations
for managing air traffic control [ATC] clearance
for managing network coverage, e.g. ensuring transmission connections for UAVs
Flight plan management

for flight plan modification

for identification of landing sites, e.g. of diversion airports

for take-off

for two or more aircraft
for unmanned aircraft
for emergency situations, e.g. hijacking or bird strikes
in accordance with predefined flight zones, e.g. to avoid prohibited zones

for monitoring traffic
